# deviceType

**Instance Property**

A device type that indicates where the system executes the layer.

## Declaration

```swift
var deviceType: MLCDeviceType { get }
```

## Discussion

The system uses the [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCDevice] you provide to [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCTrainingGraph/compile(options:device:)] to execute the layers in the graph.

If you select [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCDeviceType/ane], it is possible that some layers may not execute on the [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCDeviceType/ane], but instead on the CPU or GPU.

## Inspecting a Layer

- **layerID**: A unique number that identifies each layer.
- **label**: A string that helps identify this layer.
- **isDebuggingEnabled**: A Boolean that indicates whether you choose to debug the layer when executing a graph that includes it.
- **supportsDataType(_:on:)**: Returns a Boolean that indicates whether instances of this layer accept source tensors for the data type and device that you specify.
